Video.summary: Emeril and young chef CJ Calhoun make a meal any kid would love!
Video.title: with CJ Calhoun, Dominique Taylor

Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Tired of the same old chicken recipes? Emeril's prepares two exciting new chicken recipes.
Video.title: Chicken with a Twist

Video.summary: Emeril and Abita CEO Dave Blossman enjoy a beer-centric menu.
Video.title: with Dave Blossman

Video.summary: Emeril shows New Orleans Saints player Juwan Johnson how to prepare a classic Big Easy dinner.
Video.title: with Juwan Johnson, Chanen Johnson

Video.summary: Emeril and Voodoo priestesses Brandi and Maggie celebrate New Orleans' annual Voodoo Fest.
Video.title: with Mambo Brandi, Mambo Maggie

Video.summary: Subtley sweet, Emeril shows you how to make the most of figs.
Video.title: Fig Envy

Video.summary: Emeril prepares dishes with saffron grown right in the southern United States.
Video.title: Saffron from the South

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Chef Aaron Sanchez enjoy a Cuban-inspired menu, with a New Orleans spin.
Video.title: with Aaron Sanchez

Video.summary: Emeril, Lindsey Brower, and Nan Wallis create a mouth-watering meal inspired by locally-brewed sake.
Video.title: with Lindsey Brower, Nan Wallis

Video.summary: Emeril and interns Asia Magee and Chassidy Carter take on classic down-home dishes made at Cafe Reconcile.
Video.title: with Asia Magree, Chassidy Carter

Video.summary: Dallas Cowboys superfan Jesse Prado, aka Big Brother, creates Tex-Mex barbecue with a Louisiana kick.
Video.title: Dallas

Video.summary: Denver superfan Catherine Highland, aka The Bronco Babe, grills up dishes to honor the state of Colorado.
Video.title: Denver

Video.summary: Emeril and Chef Shermond Esteen prepare dishes inspired by Shermond's brunch menu.
Video.title: with Shermond Esteen

Video.summary: Zucchini Bread, Zucchini Pancake, Zucchini Tian
Video.title: Zucchini

Video.title: Shiitakes

Video.summary: A trip to a farmer's market inspired Emeril to present these hearty recipes.
Video.title: Cooking Local, Cooking Fresh

Video.summary: Emeril creates dishes with heart-healthy nutrients.
Video.title: Heart-Healthy Meals

Video.summary: Fish and Vinegar Chips, Fish and Chips with Tartar Sauce
Video.title: Fish and Chips

Video.summary: Emeril whips up Big Freedia's favorite southern meal.
Video.title: with Big Freedia

Video.summary: For a Tampa Bay-style tailgate, treat your guests to Emeril's grilled fish with coconut rice.
Video.title: Tampa Bay Buccaneers

Video.summary: Emeril shares his favorite burger recipes.
Video.title: Hamburger 101

Video.summary: For a Carolina-inspired tailgate, wow your guests with Emeril's take on some hometown faves.
Video.title: Carolina Panthers

Video.summary: It's a pizza party! Emeril will how you how to make basic dough and add classic toppings.
Video.title: Making Pizza at Home

Video.summary: Emeril shows a group of bachelors how to impress with a classic and affordable French dinner.
Video.title: Frugal French

Video.summary: Vegetable Satay, Chicken and Beef Satay, Sweet and Sour Sauce, Peanut Sauce
Video.title: Satays

Video.title: Asparagus

Video.title: New York Jets

Video.title: Artichokes

Video.title: with Justin Kennedy

Video.title: Atlanta
